title: Manage organic soil improvement
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage organic soil improvement demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Monitor indicators of soil fertility

pcs.text: Determine the objective for soil condition for farm according to workplace conditions and organic agriculture standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the objective for soil condition for farm according to workplace conditions and organic agriculture standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the objective for soil condition for farm according to workplace conditions and organic agriculture standards.

pcs.text: Develop baseline data from soil sample and test conducted on reference sites across property according to organic industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop baseline data from soil sample and test conducted on reference sites across property according to organic industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop baseline data from soil sample and test conducted on reference sites across property according to organic industry standards.

pcs.text: Assess and record soil chemical and physical characteristics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and record soil chemical and physical characteristics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and record soil chemical and physical characteristics.

pcs.text: Assess and record soil biological activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and record soil biological activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and record soil biological activity.

pcs.text: Analyse test results to identify trends in soil health and fertility and areas for improvement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse test results to identify trends in soil health and fertility and areas for improvement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse test results to identify trends in soil health and fertility and areas for improvement.

pcs.text: Identify health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Monitor indicators of soil fertility

elements.title: Assess soil-related factors for selected plants

pcs.text: Identify nutritional requirements of selected plant species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify nutritional requirements of selected plant species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify nutritional requirements of selected plant species.

pcs.text: Conduct field observations of plants and soil to identify possible defects
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct field observations of plants and soil to identify possible defects?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct field observations of plants and soil to identify possible defects.

pcs.text: Select soil and plant tissue tests for laboratory testing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select soil and plant tissue tests for laboratory testing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select soil and plant tissue tests for laboratory testing.

pcs.text: Sample plant tissue and soils according to testing laboratory specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sample plant tissue and soils according to testing laboratory specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sample plant tissue and soils according to testing laboratory specifications.

pcs.text: Determine management and input requirements for farming system according to soil and plant tissue test results and observations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine management and input requirements for farming system according to soil and plant tissue test results and observations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine management and input requirements for farming system according to soil and plant tissue test results and observations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assess soil-related factors for selected plants

elements.title: Select, design and implement allowable systems, techniques and inputs to optimise soil fertility

pcs.text: Identify range of permitted inputs according to National Standard for Organic and Bio-Dynamic Produce
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify range of permitted inputs according to National Standard for Organic and Bio-Dynamic Produce?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify range of permitted inputs according to National Standard for Organic and Bio-Dynamic Produce.

pcs.text: Identify and implement cultural practices to enhance soil fertility, function and health

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and implement cultural practices to enhance soil fertility, function and health.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate inputs based on soil and plant analyses, and observations.

pcs.text: Select and manage cover crop and pasture systems according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and manage cover crop and pasture systems according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and manage cover crop and pasture systems according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Develop, apply and monitor mulching and composting systems according to production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop, apply and monitor mulching and composting systems according to production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop, apply and monitor mulching and composting systems according to production plan.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Design and implement crop rotations and grazing management systems to optimise soil fertility according to production plan.
